basic_details.job_title: UPMSCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for General Manager, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Uttar Pradesh Medical Supplies Corporation (UPMSCL) General Manager (AHL), Manager-Legal, Pharmacist (Drug Procurement) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website upmscl.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the UPMSCL General Manager (AHL), Manager-Legal, Pharmacist (Drug Procurement) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per the State Reservation Policy of Uttar Pradesh.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in Human Resources, Bachelor Degree in Law (LL.B), B. Pharma or Graduate in Science/Chemistry/Bio-Chemistry
qualification.details: General Manager (AHL): MBA degree in Human Resources from a recognized Institution/University. Manager-Legal: Bachelor Degree in Law (LL.B) from UGC recognized Indian University. Pharmacist (Drug Procurement): Full-time B. Pharma Degree or Graduate in Science/Chemistry/Bio-Chemistry from a recognized University/Institute.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level-12 / Pay Level-10 / Pay Level-08
salary_details.details: General Manager (AHL): (78,800-1,40,000) Pay Level-12 Manager-Legal: (56,100-80,000) Pay Level-10 Pharmacist (Drug Procurement): (47,600-50,000) Pay Level-08

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for UPMSCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.upmscl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for UPMSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the UPMSCL Recruitment 2026 is July 1, 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in UPMSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the posts of General Manager (AHL), Manager-Legal, and Pharmacist (Drug Procurement) in UPMSCL Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for UPMSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for UPMSCL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the UPMSCL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in UPMSCL Recruitment 2026 is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Uttar Pradesh government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post: MBA in HR for General Manager (AHL), LL.B for Manager-Legal, and B. Pharma or Graduate in Science/Chemistry/Bio-Chemistry for Pharmacist.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for UPMSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) in the UPMSCL Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for UPMSCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Preliminary Evaluation Process followed by a Personal Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post, ranging from Pay Level-08 (approx. 47,600-50,000) for Pharmacist to Pay Level-12 (approx. 78,800-1,40,000) for General Manager (AHL).

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Uttar Pradesh Medical Supplies Corporation (UPMSCL), which is http://www.upmscl.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.
